name: Direct Worker Main
description: Middle-management dispatch: validates a {worker,on,value} directive and routes it to one of the autonomous workers (redbtn/become/eliteEntries) — queues nextTurn/nextStrategic via global state, or enables/disables the worker automation.

config.value: {{(function(){var i=(state.data&&state.data.input)||{};var w=i.worker;var on=i.on;var v=i.value;var W={redbtn:{namespace:'worker',automationId:'copilot-worker-auto-1778813652',displayName:'redbtn Worker — Claude'},become:{namespace:'become-worker',automationId:'worker-become-claude-1779819849075',displayName:'Become Worker — Claude'},eliteEntries:{namespace:'ee-worker',automationId:'worker-ee-codex-1779819849075',displayName:'Elite Entries Worker — Codex'}};var ONS=['run','strategic','enable','disable'];var WK=['redbtn','become','eliteEntries'];var t=W[w]||null;var e=null;if(!t){e={success:false,error:"Unknown worker '"+String(w)+"'. Must be one of: "+WK.join(', ')+".",accepted:WK};}else if(ONS.indexOf(on)===-1){e={success:false,error:"Unknown action '"+String(on)+"'. Must be one of: "+ONS.join(', ')+".",accepted:ONS};}else if((on==='run'||on==='strategic')&&(v===undefined||v===null||String(v).trim()==='')){e={success:false,error:"Action '"+on+"' requires a non-empty 'value' (the directive text).",accepted:WK};}return {target:t,errorResult:e};})()}}
